{{CargoRelic
|name=Krystal Ball Award
|class_id=20348
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=The Krystal Ball Award is an award for the best feature film at the Karlovy Vary International Film Festival. It is the highest honor in the film industry of Central and Eastern Europe.
|fame=14
|art=17
|fth=15
|civ=28
|tech=16
|ss1=Per 3 Species War joined, Snail TECH +2<br>Species War Enlisted: 15/15
|ss2=Per 3 Species War joined, Snail TECH +4<br>Species War Enlisted: 15/15
|ss3=Per 3 Species War joined, Snail TECH +6<br>Species War Enlisted: 15/15
|ss4=Per 3 Species War joined, Snail TECH +6<br>Species War Enlisted: 15/15
|ss7=Per 3 Species War joined, Snail TECH +6<br>Species War Enlisted: 15/15<br> (Awakened)
}}
